Plot heat map from LakeEnsemblR.WQ NetCDF output

Source: R/plot_heatmap_wq.r
plot_heatmap_wq.Rd

Plot a heat map for a metric stored in a NetCDF created by create_netcdf_output(). Unlike LakeEnsemblR::plot_heatmap(), this function uses the metric names as written in the file (e.g., Temp_degreeCelcius).

Usage

plot_heatmap_wq(
  ncdf,
  metric,
  models = NULL,
  member = 1,
  spin_up = 0,
  tile_width = NULL,
  tile_height = NULL
)

Arguments

ncdf

character; path to NetCDF file.

metric

character; metric variable name in the NetCDF.

models

character vector; optional subset/order of model names. If NULL, all available models except Obs are used.

member

integer; ensemble member index to plot. Defaults to 1.

spin_up

numeric; number of days to omit from start of series.

tile_width

numeric; optional tile width in seconds.

tile_height

numeric; optional tile height in depth units.

Value

ggplot object.

On this page
